{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Snail Shell was owned by someone called the Dragon Ranger, who infused the object with its strength as a gift to its successor.
|affct=CIV
|hard=HP
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=9742
|relic1=Dragon Medal
|relic2=Dragon Crystal
|relic3=Hillary's Pickaxe
|relic4=Im's Arrow
|relic5=Dragon Radar
}}
|color=green
|earth=1
|water=1
|fire=2
|wind=2
|form=Dragon
|element=Wind
|realm=Yamato
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
